title: CEDR: robust consensus cancer subtyping with multi-omics data via ensemble dimensionality reduction.
snippet: Cancer is a highly heterogeneous disease underpinned by complex molecular alterations. Accurate subtyping is critical for guiding personalized treatment and improving clinical outcomes. However, multi-omics data are high-dimensional, noisy, and heterogeneous across platforms, posing major challenges for reliable subtyping. To address this, dimensionality re...

title: GEDO: topology-based inference of gene module activity in Sjögren's disease.
snippet: Inferring gene module activity is key to understanding transcriptomic dysregulation in case-control studies. Most existing gene set analysis methods focus on differences between groups without considering the complex geometry of the data. We introduce GEDO, a graph and topology-based method that infers gene module activity through a transition score, quanti...
